title: Trails
description: Customizable client-side player trails with vanilla particles!
body:
# **Trails mod**

This mod provides a small cosmetic player trail, purely client sided. Which can be configured to be delayed based off of your ping (or any number you want!).

Trails are only created when you move, to prevent any annoying particles continuously spawning in your face.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Gpg5CjEKohM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(More previews are in the gallery, and don't forget to check out [Tektonikal](https://modrinth.com/user/Tektonikal))

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
